name: Parys - Hunter of the Maddened
description:
It has been a year since the disease known as Frenzy has broken out, making all mages who contract it go insane. While the world has plunged into a state of chaos as those who are infected run rampant, rending the very earth itself, there is still some hope. A new order, one comprised of the majority of uninfected mages, was formed to hunt down and purge these infected individuals.

They are known as the Hunters of the Maddened.
creator: Helixus
